page_metadata.biotools__summary: BiDesigned and developed as an enhancement to BioSM. It is, on average, 8 times faster than BioSM without compromising the quality of the predictions made. This software will be an extremely useful tool in the timely identification of unknown biochemical structures in metabolomics.
